theme: Five rules for incentive trips that work

linkedin.text:
Most incentive trips fail for the same five reasons. Here's how to get them right:

1) Reward, don't schedule — free time is the gift, not the filler.
2) One unforgettable hero moment beats five good ones.
3) Mix the org chart at dinner; that's where culture is built.
4) Handle every transfer invisibly — friction is all guests remember as 'bad'.
5) Brief, don't manage — your people are adults on holiday.

We build all five in from day one.

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' or book a free 30-minute call for our full planning checklist.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #EventPlanning #MICE #Leadership

5 rules for an incentive trip people actually love 👇✨

1️⃣ Reward, don't schedule — free time is the gift
2️⃣ One hero moment > five good ones
3️⃣ Mix the org chart at dinner = real culture
4️⃣ Invisible transfers — friction is the only 'bad' memory

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #TeamBuilding #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture #EventTips

facebook.text:
After 200+ events, we've learned exactly what separates an incentive trip people love from one they just tolerate. Five things:

1) Reward, don't schedule — free time is the gift, not the filler.
2) One unforgettable hero moment beats five good ones.
3) Mix the org chart at dinner; that's where culture is built.
4) Handle every transfer invisibly — friction is the only thing guests remember as 'bad'.
5) Brief, don't manage — your people are adults on holiday.

Which one do most companies get wrong? Tell us in the comments. 👇

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #MICE #TeamCulture
